data.content: Planning complete. Implement in the settings agents scan flow only: refactor scanned selection state to support multiple option ids per CLI, remove row-level Add/registered affordances and the Add All header action, show scanned.path under the row label, convert the model chooser to searchable multi-select with selected-model badges on the row, and restyle section-level Add/Scan buttons to the requested green variants. Rename the OpenAI-facing provider surface in agent-identity to Codex, but audit downstream tests carefully because some openai strings may be analytics keys rather than display labels. Confirmed test updates are needed at least in settings-scan, settings-coverage, and settings-agents-scanned, with likely follow-on assertions in lease-audit, local-worker, settings-agents, settings-load, and setup-settings-writer. After implementation, install deps in the worktree and run lint, tsc, and test before advancing.
